_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis type 2 tumor suppressor protein is expressed in oligodendrocytes and regulates cell proliferation and process formation.

_contextSnippet: Control-transfected RT4 cells in culture were able to successfully close the denuded area 24 hours after the scratch was inflicted (92.7 ± 6.5%)...Nf2-transfected RT4 cells were not able to completely close the cell-free region (only 59.3 ± 9.9%)
details: NF2 overexpression reduced scratch closure from 92.7±6.5% to 59.3±9.9% and caused 25% reduction in cell path length
